title: task
description:
rust/lichen-link/src/identity.rs:107-110 - The test identity_from_seed_consistent() calls Identity::from_seed(seed) twice, but Seed does not implement Copy (due to ZeroizeOnDrop), so the second call uses a moved value.

Failure scenario: cargo test -p lichen-link --features schnorr,std fails to compile with E0382 'use of moved value'.

Fix: Clone the seed for the second call: Identity::from_seed(seed.clone())
close_reason: No fix needed: code is already correct. Seed is cloned on line 108 (seed.clone()) then the original is moved on line 109 - valid Rust, no double-move. Test compiles and passes.
